# MFMailComposeError.Code.sendFailed

**Case**

An error occurred while trying to queue or send the email message.

## Declaration

```swift
case sendFailed
```

## Constants

- **MFMailComposeError.Code.saveFailed**: An error occurred while trying to save the email message to the Drafts folder.
